sizing_rule.note: Annualize daily volatility using √252 factor (15.87450787) to convert 20-day standard deviation into annualized volatility for volatility-scaled position sizing. Scale position size inversely to resulting annualized volatility metric.

source_rule_text: Annualize volatility data by multiplying the sample standard deviation by the square root of 252 trading days per year (15.87450787) to convert daily volatility measurements into annualized volatility figures for use in position sizing models.
